results.evidence: benchmark-runner.ts uses Promise.allSettled for parallel case execution
judge.ts: Promise.all for intra-case assertion judging
Semaphore from concurrency.ts gates concurrent LLM calls
judgeClient parameter in judge.ts enables separate judge model
--judge-model CLI flag wired through index.ts → eval.ts → run.ts
judge-cache.ts with SHA-256 content-hash keyed by assertion+output+model
GenerateResult.cost field populated from OpenRouter usage.total_cost
sweep-runner.ts runs evals across N models with configurable judge
LeaderboardPanel.tsx with table, sparklines, Best Model badge
integration-runner.ts launches Playwright with Chrome profile
Cleanup phase in integration-runner.ts runs on pass or fail
rate-limiter.ts PlatformRateLimiter with per-platform token buckets
